comments.body:
LGTM
Would like to let @giuseppe take a peak, if he doesn't by tomorrow morning, I'll merge then.

The conda-forge packages are built within the `condaforge/linux-anvil` container (https://github.com/conda-forge/docker-images/blob/master/linux-anvil/Dockerfile), which is based off centos:6 to have minimal libc requirements and is lacking the memfd.h file. I do believe that the patch will fix this.

@epruesse How about I add:

```
/* Open Source projects like conda-forge, want to package podman and are based 
   off of centos:6, Conda-force has minimal libc requirements and is lacking 
   the memfd.h file, so we use mmam.h
*/
```
Thanks @rhatdan  - it just sounded like something where someone down the road would think "What's this, why aren't we just including the right header file" and remove the code.

:pushpin: Commit 4b04cec has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan 4b04cec4c3f4c717fb08a3206d7a59abe7d78c1a -->
